gist.headline: A pulley for your thoughts
gist.blurb: IdeaPulley just landed in the greenhouse! It uses multi-agent reasoning to help you generate, validate, and evolve your next big idea.
gist.summary: Added IdeaPulley, an AI-driven multi-agent reasoning system for generating and validating ideas, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover IdeaPulley in the apps directory to help brainstorm and evolve their projects.
gist.visual_concept: IdeaPulley suggests mechanics, lifting, and ideas (lightbulbs). The scene should feature Polly the bee operating a literal pulley system to hoist a glowing lightbulb (idea) out of a garden, assisted by tiny robot agents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny inventor's apron, operating a wooden pulley system that hoists a glowing giant lightbulb out of a lime green (#ecf874) flower bed. Several tiny robot helpers are analyzing the lightbulb. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny inventor's apron, operating a wooden pulley system that hoists a glowing giant lightbulb out of a lime green (#ecf874) flower bed. Several tiny robot helpers are analyzing the lightbulb. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
